plugins.name: finding-unknowns
plugins.description: Surface a task's unknowns before, during, and after implementation — a map-unknowns quadrant walk, a learn-the-domain teaching pass, an implementation-notes deviation log, a merge-time understanding check, and a blind-spot-scout subagent.

plugins.name: fable-orchestrator
plugins.description: Run the main session as a Fable commander that delegates implementation, research, testing, and review to Sonnet worker subagents — four Sonnet workers, a model-routing doctrine skill, an /orchestrate pipeline command, and an optional fable-coordinator persona for `claude --agent`.
